member.name: T:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiDataFile
member.summary: Represents one complete collection of midi events from a file - standard midi or yamaha style files. Writes subsets to various output formats.

member.name: F:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiDataFile._patterns
member.summary: All the file pattern sections. Plain midi files will have only one, unnamed.

member.name: P:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiDataFile.Tempo
member.summary: Tempo if provided in file track.

member.name: P:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiDataFile.SharpsFlats
member.summary: Key signature if provided in file track.

member.name: P:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiDataFile.TimeSignature
member.summary: Time signature if provided in file track.

member.name: M:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiDataFile.Read(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.param: Include events like controller changes, pitch wheel, ...

member.name: M:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiDataFile.GetPattern(System.String)
member.returns: The pattern. Throws if name not found.

member.name: M:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiDataFile.GetPatternNames
member.summary: Get all useful pattern names - those with musical notes.

member.name: M:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiDataFile.ReadMTrk(System.IO.BinaryReader,System.Boolean)
member.param: Include events like controller changes, pitch wheel, ...

member.name: M:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiDataFile.ReadStream(System.IO.BinaryReader,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read a number from stream and adjust endianess.

member.name: M:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiExport.ExportCsv(System.String,Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Pattern,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Header)
member.summary: Export the contents in a csv readable form. This is as the events appear in the original file.

member.name: M:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiExport.ExportMidi(System.String,Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Pattern,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Header)
member.summary: Export pattern parts to individual midi files. This is as the events appear in the original file.

member.name: M:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.MidiExport.ExportPianoRoll(System.String,Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Pattern,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Header)
member.summary: Export the contents as a text piano roll. TODO1

member.name: T:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Pattern
member.summary: Represents the contents of a midi file pattern. If it is a plain midi file (not style) there will be one only.

member.name: F:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Pattern._mt
member.summary: For scaling midi ticks to internal.

member.name: P:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Pattern.Name
member.summary: Pattern name. Empty indicates single pattern aka plain midi file.

member.name: P:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Pattern.Tempo
member.summary: Tempo, if supplied by file. Default indicates invalid which will be filled in during read.

member.name: P:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Pattern.TimeSignature
member.summary: Time signature, if supplied by file.

member.name: P:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Pattern.Tracks
member.summary: All the tracks in the pattern.

member.name: T:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Track
member.summary: Represents the contents of a midi track.

member.name: F:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Track._maxTick
member.summary: Max length of all sequences in midi ticks.

member.name: P:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Track.ChannelStates
member.summary: Channels and patches in this track.

member.name: M:Ephemera.MidiLibEx.Track.AddEvent(NAudio.Midi.MidiEvent)
member.summary: Add an event to the collection.
